victim.value: Barbara Mullens - vulnerable woman living alone, heavily medicated with sleeping pills, unaware of being stalked
victim.quote: Barbara Mullens who was in the room, currently dreaming about blue frogs, was the only occupant of the large house

closed_world.value: Three terraced houses where Dale secretly lives in the lofts and moves between them
closed_world.quote: in the loft, was where he lived

culprit_and_motive.value: Dale Chandler - 59-year-old man hiding from authorities, living parasitically in people's lofts for shelter and survival
culprit_and_motive.quote: His name was Dale Chandler, 59 years old

red_herring.value: Dale's elaborate pranks and food tampering designed to confuse the house occupants about mysterious activities
red_herring.quote: As one of his jokes, Dale would put food from the fridge in the cat bowl. Slices of bacon. Salted peanuts, carrots

clue_fairness.value: Dale's physical presence and activities are directly shown to the reader - his movements, spying, and three-year routine
clue_fairness.quote: He had done it many times before, because in the loft, was where he lived.

social_world.value: Isolated suburban housing with vulnerable single occupants - Barbara living alone, patterns of absence and routine
social_world.quote: Barbara Mullens who was in the room, currently dreaming about blue frogs, was the only occupant of the large house

alibi.value: Dale's secret residence in the loft provides perfect concealment - occupants never suspect his presence
alibi.quote: She had never seen him. Never known about him. Yet he had been doing this several times a week for three years.

media_and_audience.value: House sales and property showings suggest external investigation or aftermath of discovered crimes
media_and_audience.quote: in all of them there was a 'for-sale' sign, and it dawned on him that he would be getting new neighbours

_meta.title: ebook john jones cuckoo in the nests
